'''Glade''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]]. It was a polluted [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] plagued by [[Acid/Legends|acidic]] rains that rusted machinery within weeks.

{{Planet-stub}}
